project_identity.current_name: Claude for Legal Workflow Sovereignty Audit Lab
project_identity.privacy_class: public research harness with excluded local private workspace
project_identity.sovereignty_boundary: The public repository owns public methods and candidate analysis; both ignored private roots, client data, release decisions, and external systems remain outside its authority.

unavailable_sources: Anthropic closed runtime and internal intent
Anthropic trademark/license permission or cooperative publication
Kirkland primary architecture and executed commercial terms
gaps: PR 50 remains captured_incomplete_unknown due to GitHub /files listing ceiling versus detail.changed_files
Closed Anthropic runtime, tenant behavior, retention, and training remain Unknown; no Anthropic Q&A sought

outcome: Terminal Local Completion: an evidence-reproducible, privacy-safe, unpublished research system for public Claude-for-Legal materials, with permanent unknowns explicit, Anthropic-cooperative publication not pursued, and release blocked.
non_goals: Allege current provider secondary use without evidence
Process client, privileged, confidential, sealed, or restricted material
Probe real tenants or people without written authorization
Activate monitoring, contribution intake, publication, or live runtime tests
Rename, relicense, stage, commit, push, or publish without separate human approval

workstreams.title: Project control and truth baseline
workstreams.bounded_outcome: Durable machine roadmap, release gate, dependency frontier, acceptance evidence, and verified current baseline.
workstreams.next_action: Reopen only when a control contract, release boundary, or dependency changes.

acceptance_evidence.description: Machine project roadmap and validator exist and pass.
Independent roadmap and release red-team completed.

stop_conditions: Stop on schema failure, authority inversion, hidden WIP, or invalid lifecycle state.

workstreams.title: Pinned static audit
workstreams.bounded_outcome: Complete deterministic inventory, URL index, pattern matches, balanced worklists, hashes, and semantic coverage receipts for the pinned upstream commit.
workstreams.next_action: Reopen only if the pinned upstream commit changes or an evidence-integrity defect is found.

acceptance_evidence.description: Inventory, URL index, pattern matches, worklists, and hashes generated.
Every text file receives bounded semantic review and an independent coverage receipt.

stop_conditions: Stop if the checkout SHA drifts or any worker requests private or live-system data.

workstreams.title: Repository archaeology
workstreams.bounded_outcome: Commit-, pull-request-, issue-, and release-level public history with exact SHAs, timestamps, hashes, diffs, and bounded strategy-change hypotheses.
workstreams.next_action: Terminal for capturable public PR scope. Reopen only if the public PR index or capture contract changes. PR 50 remains explicit incomplete unknown.

acceptance_evidence.description: History manifest records exact public identifiers, hashes, capture state, and gaps.

stop_conditions: Stop on source-rights uncertainty, incomplete pagination presented as complete, or unverifiable deleted history.

workstreams.title: Source reproducibility
workstreams.bounded_outcome: Repair revision bindings and exact locators for every load-bearing source and candidate claim.
workstreams.next_action: Terminal for best-available locator or explicit unknown/quarantine/retired claim boundaries. Reopen only on new registered primary sources.

acceptance_evidence.description: Every active claim has exact registered locators where available, or an explicit blocked/unknown/quarantined/retired boundary with repair note.

stop_conditions: Never promote a claim to reviewed from source count, analogy, or model agreement.

workstreams.title: Source-aware chunking
workstreams.bounded_outcome: Deterministic v2 static-file chunks preserve every pinned Git-blob byte, full SHA-256 identity preimages, line hints, provenance, reconstruction, and inverse adjacency; PR and web kinds remain gated off.
workstreams.next_action: Reopen only to activate pr_file_record or web_capture_span after a separate capture contract and parity suite pass.

acceptance_evidence.description: Stable chunk IDs, lossless reconstruction, citation round-trip, and change-aware adversarial fixtures pass.

stop_conditions: Do not optimize chunk size without a declared retrieval task and benchmark.

workstreams.title: Evidence knowledge graph
workstreams.bounded_outcome: Queryable typed graph from repository and revision through exact evidence, claims, arguments, objections, falsifiers, and paper sections.
workstreams.next_action: Reopen only when a governed node type, inverse edge pair, or source-to-claim contract changes.

acceptance_evidence.description: Typed inverse edges, deterministic rebuild, full source closure, and no orphans, cycles, or authority inversions.

stop_conditions: Generated centrality or similarity must never promote truth or priority.

workstreams.title: Anthropic legal and data evidence
workstreams.bounded_outcome: Primary-source map of product architecture, data use, retention, telemetry, contracts, connectors, and public legal positioning by feature and time.
workstreams.next_action: Abandoned under owner decision: do not seek Anthropic answers or cooperative evidence collection. Keep QUESTIONS_TO_ANTHROPIC.md as unanswered research prompts only.

acceptance_evidence.description: Anthropic primary Q&A and cooperative evidence collection not pursued.

stop_conditions: Do not infer default product behavior from a different tier, optional program, or stale terms page.

workstreams.title: Synthetic runtime and telemetry validation
workstreams.bounded_outcome: Authorized empirical evidence about transmission, telemetry, retention controls, deletion, isolation, and portability using only synthetic data.
workstreams.next_action: Permanently blocked under Terminal Local Completion unless owner later authorizes isolated synthetic runtime work in writing. No monitoring or live tests.

acceptance_evidence.description: Authorized tenant, synthetic fixtures, canaries, instrumentation, immutable logs, and legal, security, and privacy approval.

stop_conditions: No credentials, real client data, cross-tenant probes, or unapproved external testing.

workstreams.title: Ajax and Kirkland thesis falsification
workstreams.bounded_outcome: Falsifiable comparison of firm-controlled and provider-controlled ontology custody without converting marketing into fact.
workstreams.next_action: Permanently blocked for Terminal Local Completion: Kirkland primary architecture and contract evidence not available and not pursued.

acceptance_evidence.description: Comparative thesis retains objections, falsifiers, proof gaps, exact sources, and bounded conclusions.

stop_conditions: Do not state Kirkland architecture, custody, or competitive effect as settled without primary evidence.

workstreams.title: Radar and cross-industry studies
workstreams.bounded_outcome: Repeatable public-signal research across the current industry taxonomy with freshness and source-rights controls.
workstreams.next_action: Abandoned/not activated under Terminal Local Completion; monitoring and contribution intake remain closed.

acceptance_evidence.description: Manual pilot records rights, failures, freshness, hostile-content boundaries, and no automatic claim promotion.

stop_conditions: No watcher credentials, executable fetched content, or publication authority in repository automation.

workstreams.title: White paper and public explorer
workstreams.bounded_outcome: Human-readable argument with drill-down through claims, evidence locators, revisions, objections, and uncertainty, plus deterministic executive, academic, and adversarial mini-paper projections with stable anchors and JSON sidecars.
workstreams.next_action: Terminal for blocked candidate white paper, mini-papers, and explorer. Independent review waived for unpublished local end-state only; not publication-ready.

acceptance_evidence.description: Blocked candidate export, mini-papers, explorer, and author portfolio validate; independent review waived for unpublished Terminal Local Completion only.

stop_conditions: No white-paper publication from candidate claims or unpublished dependencies.

workstreams.title: Contribution, rename, license, and public release
workstreams.bounded_outcome: Scrubbed public repository with unambiguous identity, rights, contribution policy, reproducible release, and retained private sovereignty.
workstreams.next_action: Permanently blocked: no Anthropic permission-seeking and no public release under Terminal Local Completion. Reopen only on a new written independent-research publish order.

acceptance_evidence.description: Fail-closed release-readiness gate reports READY for a frozen candidate and exact export hash.

stop_conditions: Do not rename, open intake, stage, push, publish, or mark ready while any release gate is pending.

dependencies.evidence: Control and pinned identity precede repeatable audit execution.
Representative static source boundaries inform chunk fixtures.
Diff and PR artifacts require temporal chunk boundaries.
Source locators define citation round-trip acceptance.
Graph evidence nodes require stable chunk identities.
Comparative claims require repaired source bindings.
Anthropic-specific conclusions require primary legal and data evidence.
Public drill-down depends on the validated evidence graph.
The paper must preserve the independently tested thesis and counterevidence.
Release follows a frozen reviewed export, not an evolving draft.

execution_leases.authority: User authorized roadmap construction and immediate safe local execution; Git mutation and release excluded.
User authorized local deterministic audit execution; semantic promotion, Git mutation, and release excluded.

blockers.description: Terminal Local Completion: public release not pursued; no Anthropic trademark/license permission sought; CLAO-WS-11 remains blocked.
Resolved for the activated static_file_span contract; PR and web kinds remain separately gated rather than silently accepted.
Resolved by chunk-registry v2 full-SHA identities, byte reconstruction, migration, and Python-Rust parity evidence.
Terminal Local Completion: live runtime and monitoring permanently unauthorized unless a later written owner decision reverses HD-007.
Terminal Local Completion: Kirkland primary architecture/contract evidence unavailable and not pursued; CLAO-WS-08 remains blocked.

risks.description: A large dirty and untracked public candidate on main can hide release omissions or accidental inclusion.
risks.mitigation: Keep release blocked; freeze and scan an allowlisted candidate before any Git or publication action. Terminal Local Completion keeps publication blocked and quiet-hold active.

risks.description: Epistemic labels may be mistaken for independently reviewed or publication-ready claims.
risks.mitigation: Keep lifecycle, epistemic status, review state, and publication eligibility separate and fail promotion without exact reproducible evidence and independent review.

risks.description: Private research may cross into the public surface or Git history.
risks.mitigation: Ignore both boundary variants in release checks, use a positive export allowlist, scan history, and require human approval. Terminal Local Completion keeps publication blocked and quiet-hold active.

risks.description: Monitoring or runtime work could create unauthorized collection, credential, or hostile-content exposure.
risks.mitigation: Keep automation off and live testing blocked until separately approved in an isolated environment.

risks.description: Roadmap prose can drift from machine state and falsely imply completion.
risks.mitigation: Treat registry/project-roadmap.json as machine authority and validate it in the central navigation gate.

human_decisions.question: What public repository name and Trojan War alias should be adopted?
human_decisions.decision: Defer public naming. No Anthropic-branded or Anthropic-cooperative public name.
options: Adopt a reviewed Trojan War name
Use descriptive name with mythic subtitle

human_decisions.question: Who is the copyright holder or governing entity?
human_decisions.decision: Defer public rights-holder assignment; remain private local research harness.

human_decisions.question: Which path-level license model governs software, research prose, and metadata?
human_decisions.decision: Do not seek Anthropic license permission; no public relicensing; remain blocked.

human_decisions.question: What trademark and project-name policy applies?
human_decisions.decision: Do not seek Anthropic trademark permission; no Anthropic marks in public branding.

human_decisions.question: What public security contact and disclosure route should be published?
human_decisions.decision: Defer public security contact while unpublished.

human_decisions.question: Who may approve the exact public export hash and contribution activation?
human_decisions.decision: Owner retains sole approval authority; no contribution intake; no publication without later separate authorization.

human_decisions.question: Is isolated monitoring or synthetic live runtime testing authorized?
human_decisions.decision: No. Remain manual and offline; monitoring and live runtime testing are not authorized.
options: Approve a separately scoped synthetic tenant
Approve monitoring only after security design

human_decisions.question: Where will the permanent physically separate private research workspace live, and when may legacy .private material be migrated?
human_decisions.decision: Keep both ignored private roots on hold and defer public release.
options: Encrypted local workspace outside the public repository
Keep both ignored roots on hold and defer public release

quiet_option: Terminal Local Completion quiet hold: preserve the validated unpublished candidate; perform no Git, monitoring, runtime, contribution, Anthropic contact, or publication mutation; reopen only on new public primary evidence or a separate written owner order.
next_review_condition: No routine review required. Review only on privacy/provenance failure, new public primary evidence, or a separate owner authorization for independent-research publication.
smallest_reversible_next_action: None under Terminal Local Completion. Maintain quiet hold.
